currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Context packet regeneration engine v1 is implemented: sync-context is now a real deck/runtime action that regenerates .threadsmith/context/current-packet.json from committed truth and available context artifacts.

doneWhenChecklist.label: sync-context 成为 first-class deck action
执行 sync-context 会写回有效 current-packet.json
missing/stale packet 的 next best step 指向 sync-context
Control Deck 不再说 regeneration engine 不存在
runtime / fs-bridge / control-deck / e2e / build / JSON checks 全部通过

knownGaps: Role packet regeneration remains out of scope for this slice.
multi-provider automation remains out of scope for v0.2.0.
v0.2.0 still needs release hardening before a public release.
